meaning: n.电影短片(如故事片,动画片,新闻片等),短片
examples: The director says in a production featurette that his movie is"grounded, real and emotional" compared to other disaster films.
Film For The Few – Making of featurette with Guy Hamilton, Michael Caine, Susannah York, Christopher Plummer and Bernard Williams.
Included in the hours of bonus features, along with filmmaker commentary, is an 11-part Making Of featurette that delves into the technology behind the CGI.
